mapper.select: SELECT id, work_order_no, repair_request_id, admin_id, worker_id, status, priority, assignment_note, assigned_at, accepted_at, completed_at, created_at, updated_at FROM work_orders WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, work_order_no, repair_request_id, admin_id, worker_id, status, priority, assignment_note, assigned_at, accepted_at, completed_at, created_at, updated_at FROM work_orders WHERE repair_request_id = #{repairRequestId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO work_orders ( work_order_no, repair_request_id, admin_id, worker_id, status, priority, assignment_note, assigned_at, accepted_at, completed_at ) VALUES ( #{workOrderNo}, #{repairRequestId}, #{adminId}, #{workerId}, #{status}, #{priority}, #{assignmentNote}, #{assignedAt}, #{acceptedAt}, #{completedAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT wo.id, wo.work_order_no, rr.request_no, wo.worker_id, wo.priority, wo.status, wo.assigned_at FROM work_orders wo LEFT JOIN repair_requests rr ON rr.id = wo.repair_request_id WHERE wo.status IN ('ASSIGNED', 'ACCEPTED', 'IN_PROGRESS', 'WAITING_PARTS') ORDER BY wo.assigned_at DESC, wo.id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
